creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Hmm, at that moment in time the devd backend was so experimental, I gave up having it working and it was kind of pointless trying to report bugs against something that was actively discussed on the mailing lists.

Please close the ticket, if I try again the backend in the future, I'll make a new, up to date, report (or maybe to freebsd-x11@ for discussion).
